title: Automatic messages
description: Automatic messagese plugin with nice design
body:
**Requirements: [Placeholderapi](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi?version=1.21.8&loader=paper#download)**


**Example image:**

![messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0349ed34c96e8f483d89bb05ec70b98a5518bc77.png)



An Auto Messages plugin that allows you to automatically send messages after a specific time interval.

## Features

- Automatically send messages to all players
- Configurable interval (in seconds)
- Support for PlaceholderAPI (e.g. %player_name%, %server_online%)
- Multi-line messages with stylish formatting
- Play a sound with every message
- Reload command: /automessage reload
- Permission management (automessage.reload)

Of course, you can customize the config however you like.

<details> <summary>Config</summary>


```
interval: 300 # in seconds
messages:
  - |
    &8&l==============================
    &6⚡ &eWillkommen &a%player_name% &eauf &bDeinem Server!
    &7Aktuell sind &a%server_online% &7Spieler online.
    &8&l==============================

  - |
    &8&l==============================
    &d❤ &eTritt unserem &aDiscord &ebei!
    &9➡ &bdiscord.me/deinserver
    &8&l==============================
```
